title: Initial Fees
rows: Payable when option to purchase exercised
10 years or less real estate tenure
Payable on earlier of: 1st of month after 7th year of rebuilt/relocated restaurant, or end of previous franchise term
table_notes: The entire initial franchise fee will be refunded if the restaurant construction is not completed within 1 year of the date the Franchise Agreement is signed.
There are no refunds under other circumstances.

title: Other Fees
rows: Payable monthly on 10th day of next month
Gross Sales include all revenues; exclude sales/use tax. See note 2 for which rate applies.
Base Rent: 1st of month; Pass Thru: 1st of month; Percentage Rent: 10th of next month
Not less than 4% of Gross Sales
Most franchisees participate in OPNAD (currently 2.25% of sales) and local cooperatives.
Payable only if audit shows understatement of at least 2% of Gross Sales.
On each anniversary of opening or fixed date annually
Same as Base/Pass Thru/Percentage Rent above
Monthly installments 25th day / one-time on installation
One-time via construction billing / monthly 25th day
Kiosk licensing + technology and accessibility maintenance.
Payments and fraud management software and encryption.
Fred, Campus, employee engagement platform integrations.
Restaurant Network Management, Access and Security
Restaurant Hardware, Data Movement, Management, Monitoring
table_notes: (1) All fees imposed and collected by and payable to McDonald's. All fees non-refundable and uniform.

(2) Royalty of 5% applies on/after Jan 1, 2024 for: new restaurants, McOpCo sales, ROFR transactions. Royalty of 4% continues for: family transactions, new term agreements on existing restaurants, existing franchisee-to-franchisee sales, rebuilds of existing locations.

(3) Percentage Rent for new/relocated traditional restaurants opening on/after Jan 14, 2026 is generally 6%–23% of Gross Sales, escalating during first 7 years to minimum 11.50% by year 8. Total change generally will not exceed 3.50% from year 1 baseline.
(4) Co-investment policy allows optional buy-down of Percentage Rent in 0.25% increments at generally not less than $30,000 per Quarter.
(5) OPNAD and local cooperatives are independent entities. McOpCo companies participate at same rate.
(6) Satellite (non-MIW) rent determined case-by-case. MIW Fixed Percentage Rent generally 14%–15.5% of Gross Sales.
(7) STO/STR Percentage Rent schedule based on McDonald's Total Acquisition and Development Costs (see detailed table).
(8) BFL rent determined case-by-case.
(9) Relocation contribution required if restaurant relocated to new site.
(10) Fees subject to periodic review and may increase over time.
(11) One-time fees for new and existing restaurants adopting specified technology.

(5) McDonald's acquires real estate and building; amounts shown as rent are part of overall economic package.
(7) See Item 6, note 4 for co-investment Percentage Rent.
(8) Varies due to building size, location, estimated sales volume, transportation, sales tax. Store Systems range $150,000–$250,000.
(10) Additional funds cover employee wages, utilities, payroll taxes, legal/accounting, travel, advertising, promotion, supplies, maintenance, insurance, debt service.
(11) Combined 70 years of restaurant business experience used to compile estimates. Of 31 McOpCo transactions in 2024, 9 exceeded high end, by up to $2,035,816.

title: Training Program (Candidate Development Program)
rows: Developing the Leader in Me Class
Department Head Orientation and Making Your Mark Series
table_notes: ServSafe: administered by the National Restaurant Association (certification requirements vary by state/county).
Training takes 6 months to two years to complete. Time varies due to previous classes and weekly time dedication.
McDonald's bears cost of HU/training centers. Franchisee responsible for travel, living, compensation costs.
No compensation during training. Not an employee of McDonald's.

title: Item 19 Financial Performance Representations - Pro Forma Statements
rows: OTHER OPERATING EXPENSES (excl rent, royalty, D&A, interest, income taxes)
OPERATING INCOME BEFORE OCCUPANCY COSTS (excl rent, royalty, D&A, interest, income taxes)
table_notes: Based on 11,332 independent franchisee traditional restaurants open/operated at least 1 year. Excludes McOpCo, Satellites, and restaurants that changed owners in 2024.
Royalties were 4% of Gross Sales during covered period.
Occupancy costs excluded due to wide rent variation (effective rent 0.00%–33.33%).
Note 1: McOpCo data excluded because of certain expenses not incurred by individual franchisees. If included, OIBOC range would be $730,000–$868,000.
Note 2: Only product sales included. Non-product sales/costs in Other Operating Expenses.
Note 3: Sales ranges used: $2.9M–$3.1M, $3.1M–$3.3M, $3.3M–$3.5M respectively.

title: Item 19 Sales Volume Summary
table_notes: Data as of December 31, 2024, for restaurants open at least 1 year.
McOpCo restaurants generate significantly higher average sales than franchised units.

title: Item 17 Franchise Relationship Table
rows: Traditional: generally 20 years. Satellite: varies. STO/STR: generally 10 years. BFL: generally 3 years.
No right to renew or extend. New Term Policy (Exhibit K) is not part of Franchise Agreement, subject to change at McDonald's sole discretion.
Only if 1 of several listed violations or repeated breaches.

Failure to maintain standards; bankruptcy; non-payment >30 days; judgment >$5K outstanding >30 days; loss of possession; franchise restriction violation; unauthorized products; unauthorized transfer; denying access; unpaid invoices; misrepresentation; reputational damage; felony conviction; intentional sales under-reporting; repeated breaches.
Within 30 days at McDonald's request: sell furniture/fixtures/signs/equipment at FMV (no intangible payment); return manuals; cease using McDonald's System/trademarks.
Direct, indirect, or contingent transfer of any interest.
New franchisee qualifies; royalty increases to current fee (except situations in Item 6); full liability assumed; transferor remains liable; no current breach.
McDonald's can match any offer for business.
Purchase if managing restaurant 1 year after death/disability; purchase certain assets on termination.
May assign to approved purchaser or qualified spouse/heirs/blood relative. McDonald's will work with spouse up to 18 months.
No involvement in competing or similar business.
No competing business for 18 months within 10 miles (including after assignment or sale).
No modifications generally but O&T Manual subject to change.
Only Franchise Agreement terms binding. Nothing disclaims FDD representations.
table_notes: Note 1: If spouse wishes to train after death/disability, McDonald's will work with spouse for up to 18 months.
Note 2: Under BFL, if conditional option exercised, franchise extended for up to 20 years.
Note 3: No right to acquire additional franchises. Refer to Growth Policy (Exhibit L).
